page.title: Copy Review
page.subtitle: Enter copy and review results on the left; chat with the AI assistant on the right.

context.heading: Campaign Context
context.help: Shared context to improve review quality. Applied to every copy.

intent.label: Campaign objective
intent.help: Choose the purpose of this review. It changes how the review skills weigh appeal direction, tone, and KPIs.

productCategory.label: Product category
productCategory.help: E.g., TV, refrigerator, smartphone, air conditioner. Category changes regulatory, cultural, and claim review baselines.

originalCopy.label: Original / master copy (optional)
originalCopy.help: If you have a reference original (e.g., English master copy before localization), paste it here. Transcreation and localization skills will reference it.
originalCopy.placeholder: Global master copy or reference version

country.label: Country
country.help: Pick the target country. Language and cultural context differ by country.

headline.label: Headline
headline.help: The first impression of the ad. Keep it short and strong while delivering the core message.

subheadline.label: Subheadline
subheadline.help: Supports the headline with additional context or explanation.

bodyCopy.label: Body Copy
bodyCopy.help: The main body that delivers product or campaign detail. Lead with information that matters to the target audience.

cta.label: CTA
cta.help: The call that drives user action. E.g., 'Buy now', 'Learn More'.

methodology.label: Methodology
methodology.help: The method or strategy used to write the copy. E.g., AIDA, PAS, storytelling.

culturalNotes.label: Cultural Notes
culturalNotes.help: Specific cultural considerations — local customs, taboos, linguistic nuance.

toneAnalysis.label: Tone Analysis
toneAnalysis.help: Overall tone and mood of the copy. E.g., formal, humorous, emotional, professional.

review.backConfirm: Going back to input will reset the current review result. Continue?

helpTooltip: Click for an AI assistant explanation

objective.brandingBehavior: Drive brand search and repeat visits
objective.promotionBehavior: Convert purchases during the sale window
objective.launchAttitudinal: Build awareness and anticipation for the launch
